service_description: GitHub's v3 REST API provides programmatic access to GitHub resources like issues, repositories, and branch protection.

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: Lists issues across all visible repositories or specific to an organization. Can filter by assignment, creation, mentions, subscription, state, labels, and update time.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. If provided, lists issues within that organization. Otherwise, lists issues for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Indicates which sorts of issues to return. E.g., 'assigned' (to you), 'created' (by you), 'mentioned' (mentioning you), 'subscribed', 'all', or 'repos'.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Indicates the state of the issues to return ('open', 'closed', 'all').

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of label names to filter issues by. Example: 'bug,ui,@high'.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Can be the name of an issue type. Only applicable when listing organization issues.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: What to sort results by ('created', 'updated', 'comments').

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction to sort the results by ('asc' or 'desc').

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only show results that were last updated after the given time (ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).

tools.name: get_repository_assignees
tools.description: Retrieves a list of users eligible to be assigned to issues in a given repository, or checks if a specific user is assignable to issues in that repository.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: The username of the assignee to check. If provided, checks if this user can be assigned. Otherwise, lists all assignees.

tools.name: list_organization_repositories
tools.description: Lists repositories for a specified organization, with optional filtering by type and sorting.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Specifies the types of repositories to return (e.g., 'all', 'public', 'private', 'forks', 'sources', 'member').

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The property to sort the results by ('created', 'updated', 'pushed', 'full_name').

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The order to sort by ('asc' or 'desc').

tools.name: manage_repository
tools.description: Manages a repository: creates a new repository in an organization, retrieves its details, updates its settings, or deletes it. Use the 'action' parameter to specify the desired operation.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action to perform: 'create' (organization repository), 'get' (repository details), 'update' (repository settings), or 'delete' (repository).

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository. Required for 'get', 'update', and 'delete' actions.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository. Required for 'get', 'update', and 'delete' actions.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. Required for 'create' action (creates an organization repository).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the repository. Required for 'create', optional for 'update'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A short description of the repository. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: homepage
parameters.description: A URL with more information about the repository. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: private
parameters.description: Whether the repository is private. Optional for 'create' and 'update'. Default: `false`.

parameters.name: visibility
parameters.description: The visibility of the repository ('public', 'private', 'internal'). Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: has_issues
parameters.description: Whether to enable issues for this repository. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: has_projects
parameters.description: Whether to enable projects for this repository. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: has_wiki
parameters.description: Whether to enable the wiki for this repository. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: is_template
parameters.description: Whether to make this repo available as a template repository. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: team_id
parameters.description: The ID of the team granted access to this repository. Only valid for 'create' action in an organization.

parameters.name: auto_init
parameters.description: Pass `true` to create an initial commit with empty README. Only for 'create' action.

parameters.name: gitignore_template
parameters.description: Desired language or platform .gitignore template to apply. Only for 'create' action.

parameters.name: license_template
parameters.description: Choose an open source license template keyword. Only for 'create' action.

parameters.name: allow_squash_merge
parameters.description: Whether to allow squash-merging pull requests. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: allow_merge_commit
parameters.description: Whether to allow merging pull requests with a merge commit. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: allow_rebase_merge
parameters.description: Whether to allow rebase-merging pull requests. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: allow_auto_merge
parameters.description: Whether to allow auto-merge on pull requests. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: delete_branch_on_merge
parameters.description: Whether to automatically delete head branches when pull requests are merged. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: default_branch
parameters.description: Updates the default branch for this repository. Only for 'update' action.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to archive this repository. `false` will unarchive. Only for 'update' action.

parameters.name: allow_forking
parameters.description: Either `true` to allow private forks, or `false` to prevent private forks. Only for 'update' action.

parameters.name: web_commit_signoff_required
parameters.description: Whether to require contributors to sign off on web-based commits. Only for 'update' action.

parameters.name: security_and_analysis
parameters.description: Specify security and analysis features (e.g., Dependabot, Advanced Security) to enable or disable. Only for 'update' action. Requires admin permissions.

parameters.name: allow_update_branch
parameters.description: Whether to always allow a pull request head branch that is behind its base branch to be updated. Only for 'update' action.

parameters.name: squash_merge_commit_title
parameters.description: Default value for squash merge commit title ('PR_TITLE', 'COMMIT_OR_PR_TITLE'). Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: squash_merge_commit_message
parameters.description: Default value for squash merge commit message ('PR_BODY', 'COMMIT_MESSAGES', 'BLANK'). Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: merge_commit_title
parameters.description: Default value for merge commit title ('PR_TITLE', 'MERGE_MESSAGE'). Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: merge_commit_message
parameters.description: Default value for merge commit message ('PR_TITLE', 'PR_BODY', 'BLANK'). Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: custom_properties
parameters.description: Custom properties for the repository. Only for 'create' action.

tools.name: list_repository_activity
tools.description: Lists a detailed history of changes to a repository, such as pushes, merges, force pushes, and branch changes. Can filter by time, Git reference, actor, and activity type.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction to sort the results by ('asc' or 'desc').

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A cursor to search for results before this point (for pagination).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A cursor to search for results after this point (for pagination).

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: The Git reference (e.g., branch name or 'refs/heads/BRANCH_NAME') for activities to list.

parameters.name: actor
parameters.description: The GitHub username to filter by the actor who performed the activity.

parameters.name: time_period
parameters.description: The time period to filter by ('day', 'week').

parameters.name: activity_type
parameters.description: The activity type to filter by (e.g., 'force_push', 'merge').

tools.name: manage_repository_attestations
tools.description: Creates an artifact attestation or lists existing attestations for a repository. Requires write permission for creation, read for listing.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action to perform: 'create' (an attestation) or 'list' (attestations).

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

parameters.name: bundle
parameters.description: The attestation's Sigstore Bundle. Required for 'create' action.

parameters.name: subject_digest
parameters.description: The attestation's subject's SHA256 digest (e.g., 'sha256:HEX_DIGEST'). Required for 'list' action to filter results.

parameters.name: predicate_type
parameters.description: Optional filter for fetching attestations with a given predicate type ('provenance', 'sbom', 'release', or custom). Only for 'list' action.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A cursor to search for results before this point (for pagination). Only for 'list' action.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A cursor to search for results after this point (for pagination). Only for 'list' action.

tools.name: manage_repository_autolinks
tools.description: Manages autolink references for a repository. Agents can list all autolinks, get a specific autolink by ID, create a new one, or delete an existing one.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action to perform: 'list', 'get', 'create', or 'delete' an autolink.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

parameters.name: autolink_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the autolink. Required for 'get' and 'delete' actions.

parameters.name: key_prefix
parameters.description: This prefix appended by certain characters will generate a link. Required for 'create' action.

parameters.name: url_template
parameters.description: The URL must contain '<num>' for the reference number. Required for 'create' action.

parameters.name: is_alphanumeric
parameters.description: Whether this autolink matches alphanumeric characters (true) or only numeric (false). Optional for 'create' action. Default: `false`.

tools.name: get_dependabot_security_updates_status
tools.description: Checks whether Dependabot security updates are currently enabled, disabled, or paused for a specific repository.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

tools.name: set_dependabot_security_updates_status
tools.description: Enables or disables Dependabot security updates for a repository. Requires admin access to the repository.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Set to `true` to enable Dependabot security updates, or `false` to disable them.

tools.name: list_branches
tools.description: Lists branches for a repository, with an option to filter by protection status.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

parameters.name: protected
parameters.description: Set to `true` to return only protected branches, `false` for unprotected branches. Omit for all branches.

tools.name: get_branch_details
tools.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific branch in a repository, including its commit SHA.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: The name of the branch.

tools.name: manage_branch_protection
tools.description: Manages comprehensive branch protection settings for a repository branch. This tool allows getting, updating, or deleting main protection rules, managing admin enforcement, pull request review requirements, and commit signature protection.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The specific branch protection action to perform.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository.

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: The name of the branch.

parameters.name: required_status_checks
parameters.description: Require status checks to pass before merging. Set to `null` to disable. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: enforce_admins
parameters.description: Enforce all configured restrictions for administrators. Set to `true` to enforce. Set to `null` to disable. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: required_pull_request_reviews
parameters.description: Require at least one approving review on a pull request before merging. Set to `null` to disable. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: restrictions
parameters.description: Restrict who can push to the protected branch. Set to `null` to disable. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: required_linear_history
parameters.description: Enforces a linear commit Git history. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: allow_force_pushes
parameters.description: Permits force pushes to the protected branch. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: allow_deletions
parameters.description: Allows deletion of the protected branch. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: block_creations
parameters.description: If true, `restrictions` also block pushes that create new branches. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: required_conversation_resolution
parameters.description: Requires all conversations on code to be resolved before a pull request can be merged. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: lock_branch
parameters.description: Whether to set the branch as read-only. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: allow_fork_syncing
parameters.description: Whether users can pull changes from upstream when the branch is locked. Only for 'update_all_protection'.

parameters.name: dismissal_restrictions
parameters.description: Specify which users, teams, and apps can dismiss pull request reviews. Pass an empty object to disable. Only for 'update_pr_review_protection'.

parameters.name: dismiss_stale_reviews
parameters.description: Automatically dismiss approving reviews when someone pushes a new commit. Only for 'update_pr_review_protection'.

parameters.name: require_code_owner_reviews
parameters.description: Blocks merging pull requests until code owners have reviewed. Only for 'update_pr_review_protection'.

parameters.name: required_approving_review_count
parameters.description: Specifies the number of reviewers required to approve pull requests (1-6 or 0 to not require). Only for 'update_pr_review_protection'.

parameters.name: require_last_push_approval
parameters.description: Whether the most recent push must be approved by someone other than the person who pushed it. Only for 'update_pr_review_protection'.

parameters.name: bypass_pull_request_allowances
parameters.description: Allow specific users, teams, or apps to bypass pull request requirements. Only for 'update_pr_review_protection'.

tools.name: manage_organization_rulesets
tools.description: Manages repository rulesets for an organization. Agents can list all rulesets, retrieve a specific ruleset, create a new ruleset, update an existing one, or delete a ruleset.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action to perform: 'list', 'get', 'create', 'update', or 'delete' a ruleset.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name.

parameters.name: ruleset_id
parameters.description: The ID of the ruleset. Required for 'get', 'update', and 'delete' actions.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the ruleset. Required for 'create', optional for 'update'.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target of the ruleset. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: enforcement
parameters.description: The enforcement level of the ruleset. Required for 'create', optional for 'update'.

parameters.name: bypass_actors
parameters.description: The actors that can bypass the rules in this ruleset. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: conditions
parameters.description: Conditions under which the ruleset applies. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: rules
parameters.description: An array of rules within the ruleset. Optional for 'create' and 'update'.

parameters.name: targets
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of rule targets to filter by (e.g., 'branch,tag,push'). Only for 'list' action.

tools.name: get_organization_rule_suites
tools.description: Retrieves details of a specific organization rule suite or lists multiple rule suites with optional filtering criteria.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name.

parameters.name: rule_suite_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of a specific rule suite result. If provided, retrieves details for that suite. Otherwise, lists suites based on other filters.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: The name of the ref (e.g., 'refs/heads/main'). When specified, only rule evaluations triggered for this ref will be returned. Only for listing.

parameters.name: repository_name
parameters.description: The name of the repository to filter on. Only for listing.

parameters.name: time_period
parameters.description: The time period to filter by ('day', 'week'). Only for listing.

parameters.name: actor_name
parameters.description: The GitHub username to filter on. Only rule evaluations triggered by this actor will be returned. Only for listing.

parameters.name: rule_suite_result
parameters.description: The rule suite results to filter on ('pass', 'fail', 'bypass'). Only for listing.
